description: Staff app (apps/mobile-staff): apply the FEAT-002 animation/UI foundation across every screen and option so the whole app feels fluid and web-app-quality, and fix the screens whose dark mode is currently broken. Depends on FEAT-002. This is the bulk of the staff-app polish: entrance animations, list stagger, press feedback on all tappable cards/buttons, animated headers, and consistent light/dark styling on all routes.
steps: Wrap each screen's root in AnimatedScreen (or apply an entrance animation) for a consistent mount transition across: app/dashboard/index.tsx, app/(admin)/index.tsx|orders.tsx|reports.tsx|settings.tsx, app/(delivery)/index.tsx and order/[id]/index.tsx|navigate.tsx|collect.tsx|complete.tsx and profile.tsx, app/(packing)/index.tsx|order/[id].tsx|profile.tsx, app/(auth)/login.tsx|otp.tsx, app/alert/[eventId].tsx and alert/packing/[eventId].tsx, app/orders/[id]/index.tsx|pickup.tsx|collection.tsx|complete.tsx|damage.tsx.

Replace bare Pressable cards/buttons with AnimatedPressable (press-scale) across all list rows and action buttons (e.g. delivery order cards, packing queue cards, admin order rows, order-detail action buttons in (delivery)/order/[id]/index.tsx and orders/[id]/index.tsx). Preserve existing onPress, accessibility labels, and Vibration.

Add staggered entrance for list items: wrap FlatList renderItem content in AnimatedFadeIn with an incrementing index (delivery index, packing index, admin orders, reports lists). Use the item index for stagger.

Animate metric/stat cards on the admin dashboard (app/(admin)/index.tsx MetricCard) and the reports screen with a subtle staggered entrance and use the upgraded Shimmer skeletons for loading states where an ActivityIndicator is currently used.

Fix broken dark mode on screens that hardcode light-only colors: app/(delivery)/order/[id]/index.tsx and app/(admin)/settings.tsx currently use bg-white / text-slate-* / bg-slate-50 with NO dark: variants. Add dark: variants consistent with the patterns already used in app/(delivery)/index.tsx and app/(packing)/index.tsx (e.g. dark:bg-slate-900, dark:bg-slate-950, dark:text-white, dark:border-slate-800). Audit ALL staff screens for missing dark: variants and bring them in line.

Polish the login/otp screens (app/(auth)/login.tsx, otp.tsx): add entrance animation to the logo/card, animate the phone/email mode toggle, and add press feedback to the submit button and toggle. Add dark: variants (login currently uses bg-white with no dark).

Polish the full-screen alert screens (app/alert/*) which are the most attention-critical: ensure the entrance (slide_from_bottom) is paired with an in-content entrance/pulse animation and animated accept/dismiss buttons; reuse AssignmentAlert styling patterns.

Ensure animations respect reduced-motion / never block interaction, and that FlatList performance is not degraded (avoid heavy per-item animations that break virtualization; keep entrance animations lightweight).
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint` in apps/mobile-staff and fix any errors.
acceptance_criteria: Every route under apps/mobile-staff/app has a consistent entrance animation and every tappable card/primary button uses animated press feedback.

List screens (delivery, packing, admin orders/reports) show staggered item entrance animations and use the upgraded Shimmer skeletons for loading (no bare full-screen ActivityIndicator where a skeleton is appropriate).

app/(delivery)/order/[id]/index.tsx and app/(admin)/settings.tsx (and any other previously light-only screens) render correctly in dark mode with appropriate dark: variants; no screen is left with hardcoded light-only backgrounds/text.
`npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint` pass in apps/mobile-staff with no new errors vs baseline.
verification: grep -rL "dark:" apps/mobile-staff/app --include=*.tsx | xargs -r grep -l "bg-white\|bg-slate-50" ; confirm the list is empty or only files that legitimately need no dark handling

findings.summary: Applied the FEAT-002 animation/UI foundation across every route in apps/mobile-staff and fixed all broken dark-mode screens. No new dependencies; React stays 19.1.0. Only reused primitives from FEAT-002 (AnimatedScreen, AnimatedPressable, AnimatedFadeIn, Shimmer skeletons).
findings.entrance_animations: Wrapped every screen root in AnimatedScreen (fade + translateY, reduced-motion aware): (admin) index/orders/reports/settings; (delivery) index + order/[id]/{index,navigate,collect,complete} + profile; (packing) index + order/[id] + profile; (auth) login + otp; dashboard/index; alert-setup/index; orders/[id]/{index,pickup,collection,complete,damage}. For ScrollView-rooted screens the ScrollView is nested inside AnimatedScreen (both carry the bg class). The two full-screen alert modals keep their existing SlideInDown card entrance instead of AnimatedScreen (they are fullScreenModal presentations).
findings.press_feedback: Replaced bare Pressable cards/buttons with AnimatedPressable across all list rows and action buttons. List rows pass haptic={false} and keep their existing Vibration.vibrate(5) call so haptics are not duplicated; standalone action buttons keep AnimatedPressable's default haptic. All existing onPress, accessibility labels/roles/state, and disabled behavior preserved; cancel/link-style presses pass haptic={false}.
findings.list_stagger: FlatList renderItem content (delivery index, packing index, admin orders) and mapped lists (reports fast-moving items, packing item checklist, admin settings flags, admin dashboard metric cards) are wrapped in AnimatedFadeIn with an incrementing index capped at 8 (Math.min(index,8)) to keep entrance lightweight and preserve FlatList virtualization health.
findings.metric_cards_and_skeletons: Admin dashboard MetricCards now animate in with a staggered AnimatedFadeIn (delay 70). Full-screen ActivityIndicator loading states on delivery index, packing index, and admin orders were replaced with a header + OrderRowSkeleton list (from the upgraded Shimmer). dashboard/index already used StatCardSkeleton and keeps it. Reports keeps its small inline ActivityIndicator (a skeleton did not fit the tab/period layout).
findings.dark_mode_fixes: Added dark: variants to the previously light-only screens: (delivery)/order/[id]/index.tsx and (admin)/settings.tsx (the two called out), plus (auth)/login.tsx and otp.tsx, dashboard/index.tsx, (delivery)/order/[id]/{navigate,collect,complete}.tsx, (delivery)/profile.tsx, (packing)/order/[id].tsx and profile.tsx, orders/[id]/{index,pickup,collection,complete,damage}.tsx, and alert-setup/index.tsx. Also added missing dark: variants to the status/printed pills and STATUS_COLORS map in (admin)/orders.tsx and balance-message colors in collect.tsx. Patterns match (delivery)/index.tsx and (packing)/index.tsx (dark:bg-slate-950/900, dark:text-white, dark:text-slate-400, dark:border-slate-800/700, colored-pill dark:*-900/30 + dark:*-300).
findings.login_otp_polish: login/otp: staggered AnimatedFadeIn entrance on logo/heading, toggle, and form/submit; mode toggle buttons are AnimatedPressable (pressScale 0.98, haptic off) with accessibilityState selected; submit uses AnimatedPressable; full dark: variants added (login previously had bg-white with no dark).
findings.alert_screens: alert/[eventId].tsx and alert/packing/[eventId].tsx: kept the SlideInDown card + FadeIn indicator entrance and added a continuous scale pulse (withRepeat/withSequence 1->1.12->1) on the indicator, guarded by useReducedMotion. Accept/Reject buttons are now AnimatedPressable with accessibility labels. The dark slate-900 backdrop + white attention card is intentional and identical in both themes.
findings.reduced_motion: All new motion goes through primitives that already honor useReducedMotion (AnimatedScreen, AnimatedPressable, Shimmer) or is explicitly guarded (alert pulse). No animation blocks interaction; press handlers fire regardless of motion setting.
findings.component_change: src/components/AnimatedFadeIn.tsx gained optional className/style pass-through props so it can participate in flex layouts (used for the admin metric-card grid and dashboard stat grid where the animated wrapper must carry w-[48%]/flex-1 min-w-[45%]).
findings.verification: cd apps/mobile-staff && npx tsc --noEmit => exit 2 with EXACTLY the one pre-existing baseline error src/services/notifications.ts(7,35) TS2322. No new tsc errors introduced. Dark-mode audit grep (grep -rL dark: ... | xargs grep -l bg-white/bg-slate-50/bg-slate-100) now returns only the two alert modals, whose dark backdrop is intentional. Staff `npm run lint` intentionally skipped (no ESLint config / eslint dep in apps/mobile-staff; pre-existing gap, not a regression). No device/EAS build in sandbox, so verification is static.
findings.deviations: AssignmentAlert.tsx (an overlay component, not a route) was left as-is: it is an attention modal with a white card on a black/60 backdrop, matching the alert-screen design intent. Reports screen kept its inline ActivityIndicator rather than a skeleton because the small centered spinner suits its tab/period layout better than a row skeleton.
